content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Creative Force: Sales Jedi Anywhere in the World Naxxar Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0074/5226/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Creative Force <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.creativeforce.team/">https://www.creativeforce.team/</a> </p> <h3><strong>Great salary | Profit share | 100% remote | </strong><strong>Work from anywhere in EMEA | SaaS</strong></h3> <p>Awesome opportunity for a self-motivated and energetic people person to join our remote team and help sell our world-leading SaaS products, from anywhere within the EMEA region (Europe, Middle East or Africa).</p> <p>We pay a great salary, based on experience and location. We don't pay commissions, because good sales are a team effort—from engineering, to operations, marketing, and support, our high-performing team all contribute to a great product and service that our clients love. Everybody in the company is rewarded with a share of profit each December—we succeed together.</p> <p>Our much-loved products are in demand and are proven to make a difference to our clients' lives. You'll be selling world-leading software through a well-considered process that leaves room for personal flair.</p> <p>SaaS experience is extremely beneficial but strong communication skills, patience, curiosity, keenness to learn and friendliness are key to success in this role.</p> <h2>Join our Rebel Alliance</h2> <p>Creative Force is experiencing strong growth and as we scale our efforts in 2026 and beyond, we're looking for enthusiastic individuals to join our diverse team of Jedis to help recruit new clients as they navigate the decision process, and transform them into long-term supporters.</p> <p>You'll be a respected member of our remote global sales team and will be well supported with the tools, knowledge and answers you need to provide exceptional levels of service, and to make the most from solid sales traction with our two in-demand products.</p> <p>As you master the Force and the multitude of skills needed in this role, attracting clients to join our mission, you will be recognised and rewarded with strong career and salary progression.</p> <h2>Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li>Help prospects find the specific value they seek (this is the product you are looking for)</li> <li>Collaborate with our diverse international team to push us on the leading edge of our fields</li> <li>Learn to be a product expert and confidently answer product questions from prospects</li> <li>Discover how to be an expert in SaaS for recognition programs</li> <li>Master our sales technology stack</li> <li>Support the complete sales cycle, from qualified lead to close</li> <li>Skillfully navigate consultative sales discussions and live demos</li> </ul> <h2>Essentials</h2> <ul> <li>Applications are open to all experience levels, with a minimum of 1 year proven success in SaaS sales or a similar role</li> <li>Must live in EMEA (Europe, Middle East or Africa)</li> <li>Digital native, with enthusiasm for technology</li> <li>Discipline and self-motivation (key to success in remote work)</li> <li>Loads of energy, humour, passion, and empathy</li> <li>Genuine interest to help provide amazing value for people</li> <li>Superior communication skills</li> <li>Commitment to continuous improvement</li> <li>You have access to fast, reliable internet and a dedicated space to work without distractions</li> <li>Meet and exceed measurable performance goals to succeed and progress in this role</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-sales-jedi-6">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-sales-jedi-6</a></p> Wed, 13 May 2026 07:14:56 +0000 Fri, 12 Jun 2026 07:14:56 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-sales-jedi-6 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creative-force-sales-jedi-6 Jersey Watch: Sales & Customer Growth Lead Anywhere in the World Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5154/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cincinnati, Ohio, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.jerseywatch.com/">https://www.jerseywatch.com/</a> </p> <p>Jersey Watch is looking for an experienced sales professional who is ready for their next opportunity. </p> <p>My name is Tim, Cofounder/CEO at Jersey Watch. I'm looking for a new team member to join our company and lead the front lines of new customer growth. You'll be the first sales rep at our company and have lots of autonomy and responsibility. </p> <p></p> <h3><strong>About Jersey Watch</strong></h3> <p>Jersey Watch is the all-in-one software platform built specifically for youth sports organizations. Thousands of volunteer-run leagues and clubs across the country use Jersey Watch to manage their website, registration, payments, schedules, and communication — all in one place.</p> <p>We're a small (you'll be our 10th full-time team member), remote-first team that ships product fast, talks to customers daily, and takes product-led growth seriously. Most of our new organizations discover Jersey Watch, try it, and get up and running on their own. This role will exist to help customers convert faster and educate customers throughout the sales funnel from discovery to close. <br><br>Learn more about our company at <a href="https://www.jerseywatch.co" class="external">www.jerseywatch.com</a></p> <p></p> <h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3> <p>As our Customer Growth Lead, you'll be the human behind our self-serve product. You'll work the top, middle, and bottom of the funnel to help ICP prospects understand how Jersey Watch fits their organization, get them to the "aha" moment quickly, and convert them into long-term paying customers.</p> <p>Because our product is self-serve, the line between Sales and Customer Care is blurry. You'll spend most of your time selling to new customers, but you'll partner daily with our Customer Care team to make sure new organizations are set up for success, and you'll occasionally step in to help onboard or troubleshoot for customers you brought in. <br><br>This is a great launching pad for anyone who wants to build a career in sales and leadership. We expect our sales team to grow over the next several years, and we want this person to recruit and lead future team members.</p> <p></p> <h3><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <strong>Own inbound sales. </strong>Work trial signups, demo requests, and email inquiries. Run discovery calls and product walkthroughs with league administrators, coaches, and club directors.</li> <li> <strong>Develop relationships</strong> with a wide variety of volunteer sports administrators in the US &amp; Canada.</li> <li> <strong>Source
